blocking_findings: The final text suggests querying the month, day, or other tables and asks whether another query should be performed.
The final text offers a future year-filtered query, contrary to the answer-only finalization rule.
The final text speculates that the annual table was not generated, m2_value was uncollected, or only certain years exist; none of these causes was established by the executed SQL result.
year_filter_assessment: The final text does not claim that the executed SQL contained monitor_year = 2025, but it makes unsupported speculation about year availability and offers a future year filter.
fabrication_assessment: No station, pH value, ranking, trend, proportion, or chart data was fabricated. Unsupported causal speculation is recorded separately as a consistency failure.
